notes: v335 — SCANS NO LONGER FREEZE OR FAIL TO OPEN ON PHONES. You tapped 🏆 Top 20 to Watch on your phone and it wouldn't open — it just sat there not responding. Reproduced and profiled it: when the day's signals haven't been worked out yet (for example the first scan after a fresh or offline load), a scan was quietly grading the FULL technical read-out for the WHOLE market — about 4,300 shares — all in one go before it could show you anything. On a phone that was roughly a ten-second freeze, so the progress bar just sat there dimmed and the panel never appeared. Fix: that whole-market prep now runs in small slices, pausing to let the screen breathe between each one, so it never freezes — the progress bar keeps moving and the panel opens as soon as it's ready. Every scan uses the same prep (🏆 Top 20, 🕵️ Smart Money, ⚡ Gap, 📈 Trend and the rest), so they all benefit. In testing on a throttled phone the worst freeze dropped from about ten seconds to under one. Nothing about the scores or the logic changed — the first scan after a fresh load still does a one-time market prep, it just no longer locks up your phone while it does it, and later taps stay instant. ALSO RECENT — v334 — opening 💼 Portfolio no longer trips the browser's “page has become unresponsive” warning on phones (it was re-cleaning your whole trade history about twenty times per open; now it does it once). ALSO RECENT — v333 — the loading info box no longer jumps around while data streams in. ALSO RECENT — v332 — grading every signal no longer freezes the app (the 📋 report card and the bot now grade in the background and open instantly). (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
